name: fim_full_windows_registry_keys
description: ModuleFull (mode=0) — Windows registry keys. Simulates initial full scan of monitored registry hives (HKLM\SOFTWARE, etc.).
notes: Windows agents send separate sessions for files, registry keys, and registry values.
This scenario tests registry key indexing under ModuleFull (deleteByQuery + bulk).
A real Windows agent with many monitored hives can have 1000+ registry keys per scan.
